product: Dashboard visualization improvements and bug fixes
tagline: Counter visualization improvements: You can now use counters to track and compare metrics over time and show sparklines.
what_it_does: Counter visualization improvements: You can now use counters to track and compare metrics over time and show sparklines. To create a counter with a sparkline, select a main value and a date column. Configure filter application behavior: Dashboards now support applying multiple filters at the same time alongside the default instant application.
why_it_matters: Counter visualization improvements: You can now use counters to track and compare metrics over time and show sparklines.
key_takeaway: Counter visualization improvements: You can now use counters to track and compare metrics over time and show sparklines.
